Aries.sun: The first sign of the zodiac, ruled by action planet Mars. Can motivate themselves to face fears and blow past hesitation.
Aries.moon: Emotionally responsive and impulsive at times, leading with fiery passions over logic or reason.
Aries.rising: Known as the go-getters of the zodiac. Don't let anything stand in their way of achieving personal goals.

Taurus.sun: Drawn to a creative, indulgent lifestyle. Stubborn, loyal, and grounded. Ruled by Venus.
Taurus.moon: Delight in earthly pleasures and seek out emotional security.
Taurus.rising: Exude grace and sophistication, handling business with a sweet disposition.

Gemini.sun: Chatty and talkative, in-the-know on news and gossip. Dualistic nature allows multiple perspectives.
Gemini.moon: Ruled by Mercury, enjoy discussing complex feelings with others for mindful emotional clarity.
Gemini.rising: Quick-witted, fast communicators, always looking for unique ways to express themselves.

Cancer.sun: Ruled by the Moon. Emotionally mature, intuitive, sensitive, and artistic. Guided by tender, loving, protective hearts.
Cancer.moon: Emotions have no limits or restraints. Leads to sweetness, kindness, emotional awareness and responsibility.
Cancer.rising: Tend to wear their hearts on their sleeves and take care of those they love.

Leo.sun: Ruled by the Sun. All about ego, will, and character. Creative, playful, and bold.
Leo.moon: Possessing inner warmth, beyond generous. Shine their light onto those they care about.
Leo.rising: Radiate positivity and charm. Confident, friendly, outgoing, and strong performers.

Virgo.sun: Governed by Mercury. Thinkers of the zodiac. Process information with diligence and use facts to solve problems.
Virgo.moon: Use calm nature to gain deep clarity on matters through a kind but reasonable lens.
Virgo.rising: Fact-finders and checkers of the zodiac. Fair-minded and slow to anger.

Libra.sun: Ruled by the airy part of Venus. Bon vivants, critical, artistic, and forever stylish.
Libra.moon: Relationship-oriented. May base decisions on how they are viewed by others.
Libra.rising: Value balance in life, preferring things to be even-keeled and civil.

Scorpio.sun: Ruled by Mars and Pluto. Intense, mysterious, and ever-evolving.
Scorpio.moon: Brooding nature that exudes passion. Loyal and unconditional in love once trust is won.
Scorpio.rising: Ooze magnetism and dynamism. Not known to back away from a challenge.

Sagittarius.sun: Governed by Jupiter. Free-spirited, globe-trotting, philosophical mindset with a wild streak.
Sagittarius.moon: Considered lucky placement bringing excitement, adventure, and abundance. Can be defensive at times.
Sagittarius.rising: Jovial, optimistic, and full of energy. Sparkle with confidence.

Capricorn.sun: Ruled by Saturn. Work hard toward advancing themselves in earthly matters.
Capricorn.moon: Reflective and contemplative, working to build a better foundation with those they care about.
Capricorn.rising: Known for diligence and effort when attaining success and prosperity.

Aquarius.sun: Ruled by Saturn and Uranus. Seek unique ways to problem-solve and approach life. Intellectual and innovative.
Aquarius.moon: Integrates logic with sentimentality to attain deep understanding of inner life.
Aquarius.rising: Can speak lucidly on many topics, using lofty knowledge to charm crowds and solve problems.

Pisces.sun: Ruled by Jupiter and Neptune. Sentimental, intuitive, imaginative, and dreamy.
Pisces.moon: Hyper-attuned to the needs and emotions of others. Likely to predict what's on your mind.
Pisces.rising: Commits fully to their beliefs and has an active imagination.

Fire.relationships: Adventurous and energetic partnerships filled with passion. Not scared of conflict and may find debate exciting. Need a lot of attention and create engagement. Cultivate community through group projects where they take the lead.
Fire.self_care: Impromptu creativity, competitive sports, fast walks, dancing, celebrating. Thrive beside a campfire or candle flame.

Earth.relationships: Built on mutual respect and steady realism. Follow-through matters greatly. Take care of others but need nurturing in return. Keep friend groups and work cohorts on task and focused.
Earth.self_care: Gardening, walking barefoot on grass, getting hands in the dirt. Little luxuries like massages, gourmet food and finding deals.

Air.relationships: Find challenges the most interesting aspect of relationships. Wooed by stimulating conversation and curious partners. Need freedom to change their minds. Love parties and working for the greater good.
Air.self_care: Therapy or talking things through, puzzles, documentaries, learning new topics, reading. Sitting outside in a cool breeze or listening to music.

Water.relationships: Naturally empathetic and nurturing. Form deep connections easily. Strong intuitive sense of others' emotional needs. Homebodies who crave closeness and reassurance of care.
Water.self_care: Setting boundaries, blocking off alone time, hot baths, quiet time, being with favorite people. Swimming or spending time near water.
